stopConditions: Two consecutive tool failures on the same operation
Implementation diverges from compiled blueprint intent

Failure mode reached: IntentGraph postcode is not registered in provenance store — chain has no valid anchor point; Traversal reaches a hop where fromPostcode resolves to an unknown artifact — chain is broken mid-traversal; Hop count is 2 or 4 — chain exists but does not satisfy exactly-3-hop requirement

Failure mode reached: CompileResult blueprintPostcode does not resolve to a Blueprint artifact — self-governance cannot be verified; Blueprint architecture section contains fewer than 5 bounded contexts — Ada's governance domain is incomplete; DelegationContract blueprintPostcode does not match the verified Blueprint postcode — Ada would execute under a stale governance contract
requiredEvidence: ProvenanceChainRecord exists for each ENT artifact with hopCount exactly 3; each hop's fromPostcode and toPostcode are resolvable; timestamp ordering is strictly ascending from IntentGraph to ENT artifact; chain is marked verified in provenance store

Blueprint contains exactly 5 bounded contexts; all domain entities are enumerated in Blueprint dataModel; Blueprint processModel includes ENT gate evaluation workflow; DelegationContract for Ada references this Blueprint postcode; Blueprint is self-consistent for governing Ada's own execution
